caption: A news broadcast features reports on political figures in Bihar. The scene transitions from a graphic displaying a map of Bihar with images of two men in white traditional clothing standing on either side. On-screen text includes "कांग्रेस छटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है" and a red banner reading "JDU का धमकी" which changes to "JDU को धमकी" in the subsequent frame. The "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo is visible in the upper right, and a "BREAKING NEWS" ticker runs across the bottom along with a timestamp of "10:04 PM". The footage then cuts to a man with a mustache wearing a red vest over a white shirt, seen inside a vehicle. He gestures with his hand while speaking into a microphone labeled "ANI". On-screen text changes to "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'". The names "डिजी CM", "सब्रत चौधरी", "विजय सिन्हा", "मंत्री", "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार", and "विजय चौधरी" appear on the left and right sides of the screen.
